topics: Basics of Machine Drawing: BIS Code of Practice, Types of Lines, Dimensioning, Scales of Drawing, Sectional Views, Geometric Tolerances, and GD&T; Simple 2D Sketches
2D Drafting of Rigid Shaft Couplings (Flange Coupling, Protected Flange Coupling)
2D Assembly Drawings with Sectional Views (Universal Coupling or Knuckle Joint)
2D Assembly Drawings with Sectional Views and BOM (Stuffing Box)
Application of Geometrical Dimensioning and Tolerancing (GD&T) in Drawings
3D Assembly Modeling (Socket and Spigot Joint, Knuckle Joint, Rigid Flange Couplings, Bushed Pin Flexible Coupling, Plummer Block, Screw Jack)
Surface Modeling of Given Geometry (Helmet, Mouse, Automobile Fender)
Parametric Modeling of Standard Parts (Nuts, Bolts, Rivets, Washers)
